task_description: Fix missing WhatsApp/SMS feature flags in admin panel, replace confusing generic text inputs in ConfigFlagCard with smart rendering (dropdowns, number inputs with units, time pickers, checkboxes) based on flag type, and reorganize categories.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) passes with zero errors. ESLint (npx next lint) shows only pre-existing warnings unrelated to our changes.
